title: Evolution of Optimization Techniques
description: A flowchart showing the historical development, core methodologies, and modern trends in optimization, highlighting relationships between foundational concepts and advanced techniques.
relationships: Classical Methods form the foundation for modern techniques
Metaheuristics evolved to handle complex, non-linear problems
Hybrid Systems combine multiple methodologies for robustness
Machine Learning enhances optimization with predictive models
Real-time Optimization is the current trend driven by computational power
